channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The Rise of Group Chats: A New Form of Social Organization
item.description: Group chats have become an integral part of modern communication, impacting society at all levels. From family and friends to politics and business, group chats have emerged organically without being a 'trend' or major innovation.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
